name: bars-strand
description: Manage BARS strands - work units that track development context and progress

skills.name: create-strand
skills.description: Create a new strand with a name, description, and type
skills.command: cd {repo_root} && uv run python cli/bars-strand/bars_strand.py create {name} --description '{description}' --type {type}

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Human-readable description of the strand's purpose

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of strand (feature, bugfix, experiment, research, refactor, docs)

skills.name: list-strands
skills.description: List all strands, optionally filtered by status or type
skills.command: cd {repo_root} && uv run python cli/bars-strand/bars_strand.py list --json {filters}

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status (active, paused, completed, archived)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by type (feature, bugfix, experiment, research, refactor, docs)

skills.name: show-strand
skills.description: Show detailed information about a specific strand
skills.command: cd {repo_root} && uv run python cli/bars-strand/bars_strand.py show {name} --json

skills.name: update-strand
skills.command: cd {repo_root} && uv run python cli/bars-strand/bars_strand.py update {name} {updates}

skills.name: link-strand-to-issue
skills.description: Link a strand to a GitHub issue
skills.command: cd {repo_root} && uv run python cli/bars-strand/bars_strand.py link {name} {issue_url}

skills.name: delete-strand
skills.command: cd {repo_root} && uv run python cli/bars-strand/bars_strand.py delete {name} --yes
